differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune Hemolytic Anemia (Warm or Cold Agglutinin)
next_steps: Perform bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
Obtain flow cytometry for PNH (CD55/CD59 expression)
Measure serum B12, folate, methylmalonic acid, and homocysteine levels
Assess hemolysis markers: haptoglobin, reticulocyte count, and indirect bilirubin
Evaluate for HLH using ferritin, triglycerides, soluble IL-2 receptor, and fibrinogen
Order cold agglutinin titers to further investigate C3-positive DAT
